queries.question: Show me unaccompanied minor and tailored assisted passengers that were assisted by Clare Allen.
queries.sql:
SELECT Passengers.FullName
FROM Requirements JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = Requirements.PassengerID 
WHERE (Requirements.description = "Unaccompanied minor" OR Requirements.description = "Tailored assistance request") AND Requirements.assistant = "Clare Allen"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?requirements a :Requirements .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?requirements p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .
  ?requirements p:description ?description_w .
  ?requirements p:description ?description_w2 .
  ?requirements p:assistant ?assistant_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?description_w) = "Unaccompanied minor" || STR(?description_w2) = "Tailored assistance request")) && STR(?assistant_w) = "Clare Allen"))
}

FROM Requirements JOIN Passengers ON Passengers.PassengerID = Requirements.PassengerID

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>

SELECT ?fullname WHERE {
  ?requirements a :Requirements .
  ?passengers a :Passengers .
  ?requirements p:hasPassengers ?passengers .
  ?passengers p:name ?fullname .

}
